name: DV8 Technology Group
message: DV8 Technology Group (DV8) is fledging information and communications technology (ICT) giant that is small enough to be flexible and nimble but operates at a scale that allows it to offer cost-effective cutting-edge solutions. DV8 Technology Group (DV8) is fledging information and communications technology (ICT) giant that is small enough to be flexible and nimble but operates at a scale that allows it to offer cost-effective cutting-edge solutions. The optimal scale of our business enables us to undercut the competition, which mainly comprises multinational ICT behemoths, while offering the same quality – and often superior – products and services
